summary: High‑detail FOB capture with solid early‑90s performance; great sound quality and an excellent show.
review: The recording is a front‑of‑house (FOB) pull using B&K 4011 microphones, delivering clear detail with reduced venue ambience. Reviewers praise the solid 1993 Dead performance as a four‑star (by modern standards) to five‑star show, though no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviewers consistently rate the performance 4–5 stars and describe the FOB recording as great‑sounding, indicating a strong show with good technical capture.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOB pull using B&K 4011s (ORTF) and Neumann BS48i‑2; noted for high detail, crispness, and slightly less venue ambience compared to other FOB recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid early‑90s set typical of the era; reviewers call it a good solid performance without specific criticisms.
